name: Drain Basins
description: Galaxy Plastics’ Drain Rite drain basins are precision-built to meet the unique needs of each project—delivered on time to help you stay on schedule and on budget. Our custom fabrication ensures you meet your design, cost, and timeline goals without compromise. Every Drain Rite basin can be tailored to fit any standard PVC pipe and is also compatible with corrugated HDPE pipe from the industry’s leading manufacturers, including: Lane Enterprises / Pacific Corrugated · JM Eagle · Timewell Tile · Soleno · Prinsco · ADS/Hancor To ensure a proper fit, please specify the brand of pipe that will connect to your custom drain basin. Use the GP Drain-Rite Configurator to customize your drain basin.
